description: This class inherits from the POP class. It references a specific Script POP. It can build a POP geometry from a GeometryStagingData object. See also: POP Class, GeometryStagingData Class

methods.name: appendCustomPage
methods.description: Add a new page of custom parameters. See Page Class for more details. Example:

methods.name: buildGeometry
methods.description: Allocates the attributes and the primitive memory and uploads the staging data to the GPU. The staging data is cleared by default. * `geometryStagingData` - Staging information that defines the geometry to be created. * `forceCopy` - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the function copies the geometry staging data and doesn't clear it.

methods.name: createGeometryStagingData
methods.description: Creates a GeometryStagingData object to hold the intermediate geometry definition. This is a static method.

methods.name: destroyCustomPars
methods.description: Remove all custom parameters from the Script POP. Returns number of destroyed pars.

methods.name: sortCustomPages
methods.description: Reorder custom parameter pages. * `pages` - any number of page names in their new order Example:
